FROM customers c
| WHERE c.level = 'gold'
| SELECT c.customer_name, c.city
| ORDER c.customer_name ASC

FROM customers c
| WHERE c.city = '北京'
| SELECT c.customer_name, c.level
| ORDER c.customer_name ASC

FROM products p
| WHERE p.price > 1000
| SELECT p.product_name, p.category, p.price

FROM orders o
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| WHERE o.order_date > '2025-03-31'
| SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date
| ORDER o.order_date ASC

FROM order_items oi
| WHERE oi.unit_price < 200
| SELECT oi.item_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity

FROM products p
| ORDER p.price DESC
| LIMIT 2
| SELECT p.product_name, p.price

FROM customers c
| WHERE c.city = '上海'
| JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| GROUP c.customer_id, c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_id, c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| SELECT c.customer_name, total_sales
| ORDER total_sales DESC

FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01'
| WHERE o.order_date < '2026-01-01'
| GROUP p.product_id, p.product_name
| AGG p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_qty
| ORDER total_qty DESC
| LIMIT 3

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.city
| AGG c.city, COUNT(o.order_id) AS paid_orders
| HAVING paid_orders > 1

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
| WHERE c.level = 'gold'
| WHERE p.category LIKE '%电脑%'
| GROUP c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name
| ORDER c.customer_name ASC

FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP p.category
| AGG p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| ORDER total_sales DESC

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_id, c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_id, c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_spent
| HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 10000
| SELECT c.customer_name, total_spent
| ORDER total_spent DESC

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| GROUP c.customer_id, c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_id, c.customer_name, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'paid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paid_order_count
| ORDER paid_order_count DESC

FROM products p
| GROUP p.category
| AGG p.category, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price

FROM customers c
| GROUP c.level
| AGG c.level, COUNT(*) AS customer_count

FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP p.product_id, p.product_name
| AGG p.product_id, p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS sales_amount

FROM orders o
| JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'cancelled'
| SELECT c.customer_name, o.order_id

FROM customers c
| GROUP c.city
| AGG c.city, COUNT(c.customer_id) AS customer_count

FROM orders o
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP o.order_id
| AGG o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS order_amount
| SELECT o.order_id, order_amount

FROM orders o
| JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| GROUP o.order_id
| AGG o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS amount
| HAVING amount > 5000
| SELECT o.order_id, amount
| ORDER amount DESC

FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE p.category = '家具'
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| AGG SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
| GROUP c.customer_id, c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_id, c.customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.category) AS distinct_category_count
| ORDER distinct_category_count DESC

FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| GROUP p.product_name
| AGG p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_qty
| HAVING SUM(oi.quantity) > 5
| SELECT p.product_name, total_qty

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.city
| AGG c.city, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| ORDER total_sales DESC

FROM order_items oi
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| SELECT oi.item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, (oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS line_amount
| ORDER line_amount DESC
| LIMIT 3

FROM orders o
| JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
| WHERE o.status <> 'cancelled'
| SELECT o.order_id, c.customer_name, o.status

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| GROUP c.customer_id, c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_id, c.customer_name, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date
| ORDER last_order_date DESC

FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| GROUP p.category
| AGG p.category, MAX(oi.unit_price) AS max_unit_price

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.city
| AGG c.city, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| HAVING total_sales > 10000
| SELECT c.city, total_sales
| ORDER total_sales DESC

FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.level
| AGG c.level, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| HAVING total_sales > 5000
| ORDER total_sales DESC
